{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324001815C80F3677E59ED395B8DC"}"},"total":50},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7594916209344971582","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"兵王执行任务时不幸牺牲，却意外的回到过去，这一世他选择了弥补上一世的遗憾。
故事融入了悬疑，侦探和家庭亲情，作者创造思路新颖，文笔细腻，好评加推荐！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1768338794,"group_id":"7588828390312922136","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N/bQFd9Qh/5yqtERoAn/IoqtfyB8FHfOJt+HOb2sHfSC","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/68a9200216434b5282046ad6bbc63155~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776874636&x-signature=dLt8Mk1KEG7amnBjy02EinV465k%3D","user_id":"1805836661038236","user_name":"公子风1"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1805836661038236","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7588828390312922136","book_info":{"abstract":"悬疑+灵异+侦探
红狼特种部队队长吴枫，在异国他乡的绝密任务中壮烈牺牲，再次睁眼，却意外重生回到了妻儿尚在身旁的时光。
前世驰骋沙场、为国效力，他却错过了儿子的成长，亏欠了妻子太多陪伴。
这一次，他放下戎装，决心用余生践行“陪伴是最长情的告白”，做些贴近老百姓的实事。
吴枫创办了一家私家侦探社，前世淬炼的超凡身手与敏锐洞察力，让他在案情分析中如虎添翼。
更令人称奇的是，他手中一枚古朴铜铃暗藏玄机，能感知常人无法触及的灵异气息，专攻各类诡异离奇的灵异悬案，“枫子神探”的名号渐渐响彻街巷。
侦探社中，聪慧干练的女助理吴花与沉稳细致的男助理吴果成为吴枫的左膀右臂，三人被称为“无花果组合”。
三人携手，既有破解凡尘谜案的缜密推理，也有直面阴阳两界的惊险博弈。
吴枫一边在充满诡谲气息的案件中探寻真相，一边在柴米油盐的日常中弥补过往的遗憾，用热血与温情，书写一段兼具悬疑惊悚与家庭暖意的侦探传奇。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/05bc072aacb0ea1c67de632737ccaf95~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"天禾利","author_id":"","book_id":"7588828390312922136","book_name":"神探吴枫","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#282820","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":751,"name":"悬疑灵异","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=751&name=悬疑灵异&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":36,"name":"重生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=36&name=重生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":10,"name":"悬疑","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=10&name=悬疑&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":100,"name":"灵异","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=100&name=灵异&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":61,"name":"推理","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=61&name=推理&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":505,"name":"破案","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=505&name=破案&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":375,"name":"特种兵","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=375&name=特种兵&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7588828468138230296","read_count":"28","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"330525"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"140","tags":"悬疑灵异,悬疑,破案,重生,灵异,推理,特种兵","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/05bc072aacb0ea1c67de632737ccaf95~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779466695&x-signature=wUSmWgkoE8PXRgdyTGbAoqkOOXE%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"3212107056940794","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"122"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324001815C80F367
